creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am oblivious of the K&R C type propagations for function calls.

What is the practical impact of the reported issue?  
Non-portability of on-disk files?  If so, would that have been guaranteed by the documentation at all?

What do you propose we do about this? 
Convert to proper prototype syntax of ISO 9899:1999 style C?
